prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年海南省综合类最低录取位次分别为约6546名→5045名→4464名→3920名→4856名，整体呈先升后降的波动走势。2021至2024年位次持续前移（从6546提升 至3920），但2025年出现明显后移，回落至4856名，较2024年下降约936名，表明2025年报考热度有所降温；该校在海南省综合类招生计划2021–2023年均为33人 ，2024年缩减至30人，2025年回升至32人，2026年计划33人，较2025年小幅扩招1人（增幅约3.1%），扩招对竞争压力略有缓解，但幅度有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 中国石油大学（华东）为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年约第73名，较2025年第67名下降6位，排名近年略有波动，整体处于中上水平；该校近年无重大声誉事件记录，抖音平台热度一般（未进入总排名前106名），投档异常文件中亦无该校断档记录，整体舆情平稳，对报考心理影响中性。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 海南省2025年综合类考生67408人，2026年普通高考总人数约78000人（不确定），按近 年均为综合类估算，2026年综合考生约78000人，较2025年增长约15.7%，考生规模大幅增加，竞争加剧；该校位于山东省 青岛市，在海南省招生计划占比较小（约0.5%左右），地域偏好因素影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅后移的走势、2026年招生计划小幅扩招（+1人）以及海南省 考生规模显著增加（+约15.7%）等因素，竞争压力整体加大，预计2026年最低录取位次在2025年基准4856名基础上继续后移。预测最低位次约4977名，区间4477–5477名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 电气工程及其自动化（入校后可选拔进入碳中和未来班、卓越工程师班）
- 计算机科学与技术（入校后可选拔进入人工智能类特色班）
- 机械类（智能装备工程）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 数据科学与大数据技术（入校后可选拔进入数力拔尖班）
- 光电信息科学与工程（入校后可选拔进入数力拔尖班）
- 能源与动力工程（入校后可选拔进入碳中和未来班）
- 石油工程（入学后可选拔进入石油工程类（未来）特色班）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 材料类（包含专业：材料成型及控制工程、材料科学与工程、新能源材料与器件）
- 化工与制药类（智能化工）
- 建筑环境与能源应用工程
- 地球物理学
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次在4977名附近，区间4477–5477名。建议位次在区间下限（4477名）以内的考生可冲刺一档热门专业（电气、计算机等）；位次在区间中段（约4977名）的考生以二档专 业为主，兼顾一档冲刺；位次在区间上限（5477名）附近的考生以三档专业保底为主，争取二档专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Hainan Province comprehensive category were approximately 6546 → 5045 → 4464 → 3920 → 4856, showing a fluctuating trend of first rising then falling. Rankings moved forward continuously from 2021 to 2024 (from 6546 to 3920), but in 2025 there was a significant backward shift, falling back to 4856, a decrease of about 936 places compared to 2024, indicating a cooling of application enthusiasm in 2025. The university's enrollment plan for Hainan Province comprehensive category was 33 students from 2021 to 2023, reduced to 30 in 2024, rebounded to 32 in 2025, and planned at 33 for 2026, a slight expansion of 1 student compared to 2025 (an increase of about 3.1%), which slightly eases competition pressure but to a limited extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: China University of Petroleum (East China) is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its Soft Science Chinese University Ranking in 2026 is about 73rd, down 6 places from 67th in 2025, with slight fluctuations in recent years, overall at an upper-middle level. The university has no record of major reputation incidents in recent years, has average popularity on Douyin platform (not in the top 106 overall rankings), and no record of enrollment gaps in abnormal filing documents, with overall public opinion stable, having a neutral impact on application psychology.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2025, Hainan Province had 67,408 comprehensive category examinees, and the total number of ordinary college entrance examination participants in 2026 is about 78,000 (uncertain). Assuming all are comprehensive category in recent years, the estimated comprehensive examinees in 2026 is about 78,000, an increase of about 15.7% compared to 2025, with a significant increase in candidate scale, intensifying competition. The university is located in Qingdao City, Shandong Province, and its enrollment plan in Hainan Province accounts for a small proportion (about 0.5%), so regional preference factors have limited influence.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant backward shift in 2025 rankings, the slight expansion of enrollment plan in 2026 (+1 student), and the notable increase in Hainan Province examinee scale (+ about 15.7%), overall competition pressure increases. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will continue to move backward based on the 2025 baseline of 4856. The predicted minimum ranking is about 4977, with a range of 4477–5477.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Electrical Engineering and Automation (can be selected into Carbon Neutral Future Class, Excellent Engineer Class after enrollment)
- Computer Science and Technology (can be selected into Artificial Intelligence Characteristic Class after enrollment)
- Mechanical Class (Intelligent Equipment Engineering)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Data Science and Big Data Technology (can be selected into Mathematics and Physics Top-notch Class after enrollment)
- Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering (can be selected into Mathematics and Physics Top-notch Class after enrollment)
- Energy and Power Engineering (can be selected into Carbon Neutral Future Class after enrollment)
- Petroleum Engineering (can be selected into Petroleum Engineering (Future) Characteristic Class after enrollment)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Materials Class (includes majors: Material Forming and Control Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, New Energy Materials and Devices)
- Chemical and Pharmaceutical Class (Intelligent Chemical Engineering)
- Building Environment and Energy Application Engineering
- Geophysics
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is around 4977, with a range of 4477–5477. It is recommended that candidates with rankings below the lower limit of the range (4477) can aim for Tier 1 popular majors (Electrical Engineering, Computer Science, etc.); candidates with rankings in the middle of the range (about 4977) should focus on Tier 2 majors while also attempting Tier 1; candidates with rankings near the upper limit of the range (5477) should mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as a safety net, while striving for Tier 2 majors.
